SNMP_网管:
!
snmp-agent
snmp-agent sys-info version v2c
snmp-agent community read cipher ro_scrcu mib-view {{ snmp_view }}
snmp-agent mib-view included {{ snmp_view }} iso
snmp-agent trap enable
snmp-agent target-host trap address udp-domain {{ snmp_trap_host }} params securityname cipher ro_scrcu v2c
!
